nodes.label: Omnigent
nodes.description: AI-native task management platform with agents as first-class assignees

nodes.label: Database Schema

nodes.label: Server (FastAPI)

nodes.label: Conversation Item

nodes.label: Session/Conversation
nodes.description: User-initiated conversation with agent, persists to conversations table

nodes.label: Agent

nodes.label: Executor Types
nodes.description: claude_sdk, agents_sdk (in-process) vs omnigent harness (subprocess)

nodes.label: Harness

nodes.label: Runner

links.evidence: Properties pattern consistent with decorated Lit components
Base class pattern consistent with Lit components
x template tag from lit-html library
lit-html is core rendering engine for Lit
@watch decorator used in WaAvatar, pattern consistent with Lit

links.description: Spinner styles imports CSS template literal
WaCopyButton imports WebAwesomeElement base and utilities
Copy button styles imports CSS template literal
WebAwesome library contains ID and math utilities

links.note: Runner is bound to session execution
Host spawns runners for session execution
Sandboxes boot from prebaked host image
Host establishes WebSocket tunnel to server
Server creates sandboxes for host_type:managed sessions
modal_app.py pulls image and runs server
Docker SDK Space with SQLite or external Postgres
Extension iframes localhost server at http://127.0.0.1:6767
OpenShift overlay replaces Ingress with Route

links.description: KubernetesSandboxLauncher is a concrete implementation of SandboxLauncher
KubernetesSandboxLauncher uses build_pod_manifest for pod creation
BoxliteSandboxLauncher is a concrete implementation of SandboxLauncher
IsloSandboxLauncher is a concrete implementation of SandboxLauncher
Islo sandboxes run omnigent server which uses FastAPI
bootstrap may indirectly trigger pod manifest building
Agents can participate in comment threads (inferred)
update_versions maintains version consistency for omnigent package
dump_openapi generates spec from FastAPI app
Uses Pydantic TypeAdapter for schema generation

hyperedges.name: Turn Loop (Core Orchestration)
hyperedges.description: The heart of execution: executor instantiates → LLM call → tool dispatch → policy gate → persist

hyperedges.name: Transcript Consistency Invariant
hyperedges.description: Streaming↔durable, local↔server, post-compaction/fork/resume must all stay consistent

hyperedges.name: Three-Way Auth Flow
hyperedges.description: LLM credentials, runner↔server, client↔server; each with own refresh path

hyperedges.name: Policy Approval Flow
hyperedges.description: Policy ASK → approval card → human decision → verdict back to runner

hyperedges.name: Native Harness Bridge
hyperedges.description: SSE forwarder translates vendor events + mirrors transcript + relays policies

hyperedges.name: Subagent System
hyperedges.description: Parent spawns child via AgentTool; context flows down, results drain via inbox
Omnigent Server supports multiple deployment targets
Omnigent Server integrates with multiple sandbox providers
Multiple harnesses available for agent execution
Multiple authentication methods supported
Multiple database options (managed and local)
Runners can use multiple LLM providers
Kubernetes deployment with optional add-ons
Sandboxes support CLI-launched and server-managed modes
Test fixtures for harness skill filtering
VS Code extension iframes local server
